title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. pseudoschenkii
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. pseudoschenkii is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, commonly known as hawkweed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever, and inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. pseudoschenkii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to various health concerns.
